verses.text: 'How is the gold become dim!' The precious sons of Zion, once worth fine gold, are reckoned as common clay pots. Glory is tarnished. Sin debases what God once made precious.
'How is the gold become dim!' The precious sons of Zion, once worth fine gold, are reckoned as common clay pots. Glory is tarnished. Sin debases what God once made precious.
Even sea creatures nurse their young, but the famine has hardened mothers; tender children faint with thirst and hunger. Cruelty born of misery. Suffering can wither even natural affection.
Even sea creatures nurse their young, but the famine has hardened mothers; tender children faint with thirst and hunger. Cruelty born of misery. Suffering can wither even natural affection.

Her punishment is greater than Sodom's; her princes, once purer than snow, are now blacker than coal, unrecognized. A dreadful change. Privilege abused brings a heavier reckoning.
Her punishment is greater than Sodom's; her princes, once purer than snow, are now blacker than coal, unrecognized. A dreadful change. Privilege abused brings a heavier reckoning.

Those slain by the sword fare better than those who waste away with hunger; 'the LORD hath accomplished his fury.' Slow death is bitterer. The full measure of His anger has been poured out.

No king believed an enemy could enter Jerusalem; yet it fell for the sins of her prophets and priests, who shed innocent blood. Her guides betrayed her. When leaders sin, the whole city pays.

Men cried, 'Depart... unclean'; scattered, they found no resting place, and their eyes failed watching for help that never came. Hope misplaced. Looking to man for rescue ends in disappointment.

Enemies dogged their steps; their end drew near; even 'the anointed of the LORD,' their king, was taken in the enemy's pits. Their last refuge fell. No earthly head can save when God withdraws.

Edom may rejoice now, but the cup will pass to her; for Zion the punishment is accomplished. Judgment turns. The mockers' turn will come, and God's chastened people find their sorrow ending.
